metricDefinitions.marketEdgeFairCanonical: juiceAwareLegEv in math_models/juice_adjust.ts — trueProb − fairProbChosenSide (two-way de-vig via fairBeFromTwoWayOdds) when both American prices exist; otherwise trueProb − 0.5.
metricDefinitions.legacyNaiveLegMetric: EvPick.legacyNaiveLegMetric = effectiveTrueProb − 0.5 in calculate_ev (diagnostic; same probability basis as gating edge before haircut vs after is isolated to effectiveTrueProb).
metricDefinitions.phase72TableSemantics: Survival counts reuse Phase 72 CSV simulation: ‘current’ used CSV edge/legEv from prior exports (naive era); ‘marketFair’ applies the same numeric thresholds to recomputed trueProb − fair chosen. After a fresh optimizer run, exported edge/legEv should align with marketFair.

thresholdFollowUpRecommendation: Phase 73 does not retune floors. If PP remains at zero effective survivors at market-relative gates after fresh exports, next phase should choose between threshold retuning versus PP-specific source/pool work.
